title: ConsentExplicitnessCaps
description: Per-tier explicitness and CIC×DET caps for governed horror delivery. Each row binds a consent state and policy tier to maximum explicitness per session, a hard CIC×DET ceiling, and a mandatory cooldown after high-intensity outputs. Aligns with the Account Consent Profile module and the Horror Intensity Budget module, and acts as a hard cap layer above all other intensity calculations.

schemaRef.description: Stable schema identifier used by validators and CI to bind this policy file to the consent-explicitness-caps schema.

objectKind.description: Object kind used by CHAT_DIRECTOR and repo manifests for routing and policy enforcement.

version.description: Semantic version for this caps file. Minor/patch bumps may tighten or relax caps within governance rules.

validatorsignature.description: Opaque validator signature or commit hash attesting that this caps file passed review and Charter checks.

tiers.description: Per-row caps keyed by consent state and policy tier. Engines and Lua APIs must treat the most restrictive matching row as authoritative.

consentState.description: Effective consent state from the consent-state-machine.v1.json schema.

policyTier.description: Policy envelope tier for this caps row. Ties into policyEnvelope and descriptor policy attributes.

regionProfile.description: Optional coarse field profile describing the deployment context (e.g., Field A/B/C from the consent research). Used for diagnostics and routing hints rather than hard gating.

jurisdictionId.description: Optional jurisdiction or regulatory profile identifier. When present, caps must respect the strictest applicable jurisdiction for a session.

maxExplicitnessPerSession.description: Hard ceiling on effective explicitness score E for the entire session in this consent/policy tier band. Horror Intensity Budget and AI-Chat must clamp their own budgets to never exceed this value.

maxCICxDET.description: Hard numeric bound on CIC × DET for any content delivered under this consent/policy tier. Region and seed contracts must respect this ceiling at runtime.

cooldownMinutesAfterHighEvent.description: Mandatory minimum cooldown window, in minutes, after any event whose explicitness E exceeds the highEventThreshold defined in this row. During this window, subsequent content must remain below cooldownExplicitnessCap.

highEventThreshold.description: Threshold in explicitness E above which an output is treated as high-intensity for cooldown purposes.

cooldownExplicitnessCap.description: Maximum allowed explicitness E during the cooldown window triggered by a high-intensity event.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes explaining the rationale for these caps (e.g., link to governance decision or ethics review).

fallbackPolicy.description: Caps applied when consent state is unknown, expired, or unverifiable. Engines must default to these conservative caps rather than guessing.

maxExplicitnessPerSession.description: Global default explicitness ceiling when no valid consent state is available.

maxCICxDET.description: Global default CIC × DET ceiling when consent state cannot be resolved.

cooldownMinutesAfterHighEvent.description: Global default cooldown window after any high-intensity output when consent state is unclear.

deadledgerref.description: Optional Dead-Ledger attestation reference binding this caps file to a governance decision bundle.

prismMeta.description: Optional prism meta envelope tying this caps policy into the broader constellation manifolds (phase, tier, routing).
